subcodes.first_line: Blessed be thy days which have been linked to the Days of God, and blessed thine ear, for it hath hearkened unto wondrous melodies of transcendent glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لایامک التی اتصلت بایام الله و لاذنک بما سمعت نغمات عز بدیعا طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @presence of; reunion with God
